steps.code:
<?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php';
update_option('woocommerce_onboarding_profile', array('completed' => true));
update_option('woocommerce_task_list_hidden', 'yes');
update_option('woocommerce_coming_soon', 'no');
delete_transient('_wc_activation_redirect');
if ( class_exists( 'Kipphard\\CheckoutFelder\\Fields' ) ) {
  $fields = Kipphard\CheckoutFelder\Fields::get();
  if ( ! isset( $fields['order'] ) || ! is_array( $fields['order'] ) ) { $fields['order'] = array(); }
  $fields['order'][] = array( 'key' => 'gift_message', 'type' => 'textarea', 'label' => 'Gift message', 'placeholder' => 'Your personal message …', 'required' => false, 'enabled' => true, 'position' => 200, 'custom' => true, 'options' => array() );
  Kipphard\CheckoutFelder\Fields::save( $fields );
}
